title: Bench quick human-readable output reports a successful quick suite
input: Run `orca bench --quick` and verify the terminal output reports the quick-suite header, three scenarios, and a perfect score.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; node dist/bin/orca.js bench --quick'
